title: Pre-reg iteration 4: multi-task on all 10 assets (US + intl)
summary: Multi-task on all 10 assets (US + intl) is WORSE than multi-task on 5 US only. Adding international assets to training HURTS US performance because international vol has different characteristics. This is negative transfer.
conclusion: The FNO model is US-specific. Training on US + intl jointly doesn't help. The right approach is to train US and intl models separately, or use the US model for US assets only.
